  -c, --yamlConfig        Required. Config Yaml file location (Local | Url)

  -f, --variableFile      Variable definition file location (Local | Url).

  -s, --variableString    Variable definition string.

  -p, --armPrefix         Prefix of generated arm files.

  -m, --master            Name of the master template file.

  -v, --printVariables    Print loaded variables before generating arm
                          templates.

  -o, --output            Required. Output file location.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
